commands.summary: Focused desktop settings-store tests passed, including local-only onboarding persistence, no Twilio credential storage, loopback enforcement, and remove-credentials preserving completed onboarding.
Renderer TypeScript and bundled app build passed with the first-run local-only action and desktop bridge type updates.
Backend TypeScript build passed after the provider-optional onboarding changes.
Renderer tests passed, including first-run local-only startup without Twilio validation.
Full Electron test suite passed: 81 tests passed and 1 opt-in live Twilio test skipped.
Regenerated audits/reports/dashboard.md so Repopact reflects CLV-020 as satisfied with new evidence metadata.
Repopact doctor reported the repository healthy after CLV-020 records were updated.
Repository governance validation passed with CLV-020 marked satisfied and evidence metadata current.
Local system audit passed with CLV-020 evidence and work item metadata current.
Production dependency audit completed with 0 high-or-higher vulnerabilities.

environment.process_note: 015 CLV-020 (provider-optional first-run). ForgeLink now tracks first-run completion separately from telecom provider credentials. First-run setup offers Start local-only, persists loopback-only local service settings with no Twilio credentials or encrypted token material, starts the backend without Twilio validation, and keeps removing credentials from forcing first-run again. Twilio SMS/MMS remains available as an explicit later Settings action.
